                  <View style={styles.attendanceMarked}>
                    <View style={styles.attendanceIconContainer}>
                      <Ionicons
                        name={data.attendance.status === 'present' ? 'checkmark-circle' : 'close-circle'}
                        size={32}
                        color={data.attendance.status === 'present' ? colors.success : colors.error}
                      />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.attendanceInfo}>
                      <Text style={[styles.attendanceStatus, { color: colors.text }]}>
                        Marked as {data.attendance.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + data.attendance.status.slice(1)}
                      </Text>
                      {data.attendance.inTime && (
                        <Text style={[styles.attendanceTime, { color: colors.textSecondary }]}>Check-in: {data.attendance.inTime}</Text>
                      )}
                    </View>
                  </View>
                  <TouchableOpacity
                    style={[styles.resetButton]}
                    onPress={resetAttendance}
                    accessibilityRole="button"
                    accessibilityLabel="Reset Attendance"
                  >
                    <Ionicons name="refresh-outline" size={16} color={colors.textSecondary} style={styles.resetButtonIcon} />
                    <Text style={styles.resetButtonText}>Reset Attendance</Text>
                  </TouchableOpacity>
                </>
              ) : (
                <View style={styles.attendanceActions}>
                  <TouchableOpacity
                    style={[styles.attendanceButton, styles.presentButton]}
                    onPress={() => markAttendance('present')}
                    accessibilityRole="button"
                    accessibilityLabel="Mark Present"
                  >
                    <Ionicons name="checkmark" size={18} color={colors.white} style={styles.buttonIcon} />
                    <Text style={styles.attendanceButtonText}>Mark Present</Text>
                  </TouchableOpacity>
                  <TouchableOpacity
                    style={[styles.attendanceButton, styles.absentButton]}
                    onPress={() => markAttendance('absent')}
                    accessibilityRole="button"
                    accessibilityLabel="Mark Absent"
                  >
                    <Ionicons name="close" size={18} color={colors.white} style={styles.buttonIcon} />
                    <Text style={styles.attendanceButtonText}>Mark Absent</Text>
                  </TouchableOpacity>
                </View>
              )}
            </View>
          </View>

          {/* Class Teacher Section */}
          {data.classTeacher && (
            <View style={styles.section}>
              <Text style={[styles.sectionTitle, { color: colors.text }]}>My Class</Text>
              <View style={[styles.card, { backgroundColor: colors.card }]}>
                <View style={styles.classHeader}>
                  <View style={styles.classIconContainer}>
                    <Ionicons name="school" size={28} color={colors.primary} />
                  </View>
                  <View style={styles.classInfo}>
                    <Text style={[styles.className, { color: colors.text }]}>{data.classTeacher.name}</Text>
                    <Text style={[styles.classSection, { color: colors.textSecondary }]}>Section {data.classTeacher.section}</Text>
                  </View>
                </View>
                <View style={styles.classActions}>
                  <TouchableOpacity
                    style={[styles.classButton, { backgroundColor: colors.backgroundGray }]}
                    onPress={() => router.push('/class-details')}
                    accessibilityRole="button"
                    accessibilityLabel="View Class"
                  >
                    <Text style={[styles.classButtonText, { color: colors.text }]}>View Class</Text>
                  </TouchableOpacity>
                  <TouchableOpacity
                    style={[styles.classButton, styles.classButtonPrimary]}
                    onPress={() => router.push('/attendance')}
                    accessibilityRole="button"
                    accessibilityLabel="Take Attendance"
                  >
                    <Text style={styles.classButtonTextPrimary}>Take Attendance</Text>
                  </TouchableOpacity>
                </View>
              </View>
            </View>
          )}

          {/* Today's Schedule */}
          <View style={styles.section}>
            <View style={styles.sectionHeader}>
              <Text style={[styles.sectionTitle, { color: colors.text }]}>Today's Schedule</Text>
              <TouchableOpacity
                onPress={() => router.push('/(tabs)/timetable')}
                accessibilityRole="button"
                accessibilityLabel="See all timetable"
              >
                <Text style={[styles.seeAllText, { color: colors.primary }]}>See all</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            </View>
            <View style={[styles.card, { backgroundColor: colors.card }]}>
              {data.timetable.length > 0 ? (
                data.timetable.map((period, index) => (
                  <View key={index} style={[styles.periodItem, index < data.timetable.length - 1 && styles.periodItemBorder]}>
                    <View style={[styles.periodNumber, { backgroundColor: colors.backgroundGray }]}>
                      <Text style={[styles.periodNumberText, { color: colors.textSecondary }]}>{period.periodIndex}</Text>
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.periodContent}>
                      <Text style={[styles.periodSubject, { color: colors.text }]}>{period.subject}</Text>
                      <Text style={[styles.periodClass, { color: colors.textSecondary }]}>
                        {period.classId?.name} {period.classId?.section}
                      </Text>
                    </View>
                    <Ionicons name="chevron-forward" size={20} color={colors.textSecondary} />
                  </View>
                ))
              ) : (
                <View style={styles.emptyState}>
                  <Ionicons name="calendar-outline" size={40} color={colors.border} />
                  <Text style={[styles.emptyText, { color: colors.textSecondary }]}>No classes today</Text>
                </View>
              )}
            </View>
          </View>

          {/* Alerts Section */}
          {(data.substitutions.length > 0 || data.gatePasses.length > 0 || data.appointments.length > 0) && (
            <View style={styles.section}>
              <Text style={[styles.sectionTitle, { color: colors.text }]}>Notifications</Text>
              <View style={[styles.card, { backgroundColor: colors.card }]}>
                {data.substitutions.length > 0 && (
                  <View style={styles.alertItem}>
                    <View style={[styles.alertIconContainer, { backgroundColor: colors.primary + '15' }]}>
                      <Ionicons name="swap-horizontal" size={20} color={colors.primary} />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.alertContent}>
                      <Text style={[styles.alertTitle, { color: colors.text }]}>Substitutions Assigned</Text>
                      {data.substitutions.map((sub, index) => (
                        <Text key={index} style={[styles.alertText, { color: colors.textSecondary }]}>
                          {sub.classId.name} {sub.classId.section} • Period {sub.period}
                        </Text>
                      ))}
                    </View>
                  </View>
                )}

                {data.gatePasses.length > 0 && (
                  <View style={[styles.alertItem, data.substitutions.length > 0 && styles.alertItemBorder]}>
                    <View style={[styles.alertIconContainer, { backgroundColor: colors.success + '15' }]}>
                      <Ionicons name="exit-outline" size={20} color={colors.success} />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.alertContent}>
                      <Text style={[styles.alertTitle, { color: colors.text }]}>Gate Pass Requests</Text>
                      {data.gatePasses.map((pass, index) => (
                        <Text key={index} style={[styles.alertText, { color: colors.textSecondary }]}>
                          {pass.studentId.name} ({pass.studentId.rollNo})
                        </Text>
                      ))}
                    </View>
                  </View>
                )}

                {data.appointments.length > 0 && (
                  <View style={[styles.alertItem, (data.substitutions.length > 0 || data.gatePasses.length > 0) && styles.alertItemBorder]}>
                    <View style={[styles.alertIconContainer, { backgroundColor: '#F5A623' + '15' }]}>
                      <Ionicons name="people-outline" size={20} color="#F5A623" />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.alertContent}>
                      <Text style={[styles.alertTitle, { color: colors.text }]}>Appointments</Text>
                      {data.appointments.map((apt, index) => (
                        <Text key={index} style={[styles.alertText, { color: colors.textSecondary }]}>
                          {apt.visitorName} • {new Date(apt.fromDateTime).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}
                        </Text>
                      ))}
                    </View>
                  </View>
                )}
              </View>
            </View>
          )}

          {/* Quick Actions */}
          <View style={styles.section}>
            <Text style={[styles.sectionTitle, { color: colors.text }]}>Quick Actions</Text>
            <View style={styles.quickActionsGrid}>
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.quickActionCard, { backgroundColor: colors.card }]}
                onPress={() => router.push({ pathname: '/homework', params: { action: 'create' } })}
                accessibilityRole="button"
                accessibilityLabel="Create Homework"
              >
                <View style={[styles.quickActionIcon, { backgroundColor: colors.primary + '15' }]}>
                  <Ionicons name="create-outline" size={24} color={colors.primary} />
                </View>
                <Text style={[styles.quickActionText, { color: colors.text }]}>Create{'\n'}Homework</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.quickActionCard, { backgroundColor: colors.card }]}
                onPress={() => router.push('/(tabs)/profile')}
                accessibilityRole="button"
                accessibilityLabel="Apply Leave"
              >
                <View style={[styles.quickActionIcon, { backgroundColor: colors.success + '15' }]}>
                  <Ionicons name="time-outline" size={24} color={colors.success} />
                </View>
                <Text style={[styles.quickActionText, { color: colors.text }]}>Apply{'\n'}Leave</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.quickActionCard, { backgroundColor: colors.card }]}
                onPress={() => router.push('/chat')}
                accessibilityRole="button"
                accessibilityLabel="Send Message"
              >
                <View style={[styles.quickActionIcon, { backgroundColor: '#F5A623' + '15' }]}>
                  <Ionicons name="chatbubble-outline" size={24} color="#F5A623" />
                </View>
                <Text style={[styles.quickActionText, { color: colors.text }]}>Send{'\n'}Message</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.quickActionCard, { backgroundColor: colors.card }]}
                onPress={() => router.push('/payslips')}
                accessibilityRole="button"
                accessibilityLabel="View Payslip"
              >
                <View style={[styles.quickActionIcon, { backgroundColor: '#6B5B95' + '15' }]}>
                  <Ionicons name="receipt-outline" size={24} color="#6B5B95" />
                </View>
                <Text style={[styles.quickActionText, { color: colors.text }]}>View{'\n'}Payslip</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            </View>
          </View>

          <View style={styles.bottomPadding} />
        </View>

        {/* Guided Tour Overlay */}
        <GuidedTour
          visible={tour.visible}
          steps={DEFAULT_TOUR_STEPS}
          currentStepIndex={tour.currentStepIndex}
          onClose={tour.close}
          onNext={tour.onNext}
        />
      </ScrollView>
    </SafeAreaView>

  );
}

                  </View>

                      <Ionicons name="people-outline" size={20} color={colors.warning} />
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.alertContent}>
                      <Text style={[styles.alertTitle, { color: colors.text }]}>Appointments</Text>
                      {data.appointments.map((apt, index) => (

                          {apt.visitorName} • {new Date(apt.fromDateTime).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}

            </View>

              >
                <View style={[styles.quickActionIcon, { backgroundColor: colors.primary + '15' }]}>
                  <Ionicons name="create-outline" size={24} color={colors.primary} />
                </View>
                <Text style={[styles.quickActionText, { color: colors.text }]}>Create{'\n'}Homework</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.quickActionCard, { backgroundColor: colors.card }]}
                onPress={() => router.push('/(tabs)/profile')}
                accessibilityRole="button"
                accessibilityLabel="Apply Leave"
              >
                <View style={[styles.quickActionIcon, { backgroundColor: colors.success + '15' }]}>
                  <Ionicons name="time-outline" size={24} color={colors.success} />
                </View>
                <Text style={[styles.quickActionText, { color: colors.text }]}>Apply{'\n'}Leave</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.quickActionCard, { backgroundColor: colors.card }]}
                onPress={() => router.push('/chat')}
                accessibilityRole="button"
                accessibilityLabel="Send Message"
              >
                <View style={[styles.quickActionIcon, { backgroundColor: colors.warning + '15' }]}>
                  <Ionicons name="chatbubble-outline" size={24} color={colors.warning} />
                </View>
                <Text style={[styles.quickActionText, { color: colors.text }]}>Send{'\n'}Message</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.quickActionCard, { backgroundColor: colors.card }]}

                <View style={[styles.quickActionIcon, { backgroundColor: '#6B5B95' + '15' }]}>

          onNext={tour.onNext}
        />
      </ScrollView>
    </SafeAreaView>

  );
}
